description: Integrate a WebView into the HelpCenterApp to display the local help page at `file:///android_asset/help_center.html` and implement a JavaScript bridge for communication. The layout in `activity_main.xml` must feature a WebView with the ID `webView`. Establish a JavaScript interface named `AndroidHelp` that exposes a `submitTicket(id: String)` method to the web content. When the HTML calls this method, the application should log the provided ticket ID.
